name: Aphrodia High
description:
Welcome to Aphrodia High, an exclusive all-girls boarding school where social hierarchy is defined by species and gender.

You’ll navigate a world dominated by demihuman and human futanari, along with demihuman and human females, each with distinct biological traits and social standings.

Expect power dynamics, intrigue, and erotic tension in a setting where rank dictates everything from respect to romance.

Public conduct rules are lax, but faculty authority is absolute. Your choices will shape alliances, rivalries, and possibly your own transformation. Step carefully - every interaction matters.

This is basically a school full of crazy and sex-driven Futa's and Females. It's entirely smut, i guess.

Try the other Version of this bot "Academia Dominae", in which the school is a viper's nest of crazy and sex-obsessed Monster-Girls.

In case you are into Monster-Girls but want it more brutal, try out the "Arak Plains", a world of Monster-Girls.

1. Scenario: You are a new Student, accidentally enrolled.

2. Scenario: You suddenly find yourself in the main hall of Aphrodia High after a portal brought you here.

3. Scenario: You, who and whatever you are, arrive at the Academy and...?

4. Scenario: The Extinction of Biological Males since their Sex was simply obsolete. You are the only male in this world and that's not as nice as it might sound at first.

Theoretically you should be able to play as any Gender, Human, Demihuman, Student and also as Faculty (Headmistress is hard-prompted, everything else should be possible).

Use [introduce character] to get information about the person you meet. Usually the bot should introduce them automatically, but i didn't get it to work perfectly.

I would recommend you to create a Character introduction for your own Persona. Use the following template by copying it and simply fill in your Persona specifics:

Template: [Character Name: First/Last Name | Species & Gender: Species, Gender | Good Traits: Up to three | Bad Traits: Up to three | Hair: X | Height & Figure: X cm, Figure | Pussy or Cock: X | Others: X | Pubes: X | Rank: 1-4 or faculty ]

Example for cock: erect, hard, standing proud, twitching, throbbing, dripping, soft, limp, hanging, flaccid, etc.; length, girth, knot, balls,
